title: MBA / PGDM Jobs 2026 – Group B & Group C
org: Various Group B (Gazetted/Non-Gazetted) and Group C posts including Assistant Section Officer, Inspector (IT/CE), Sub Inspector (CBI/NIA), Junior Statistical Officer, Assistant Audit Officer, Tax Assistant, Auditor, Accountant, Postal Assistant, and more
vacancies: Approximately 12,256 (tentative; updated vacancies will be on https://ssc.gov.in)
applyMode: Online only at https://ssc.gov.in or via mY SSC mobile app
shortInfo: SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 12256 vacancies for Group B & Group C vacancies across India. Candidates can apply online only from 21.05.2026 to 22.06.2026 through SSC website ssc.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 12256 Group B & Group C Posts
basic_details.post_name: Various Group B (Gazetted/Non-Gazetted) and Group C posts including Assistant Section Officer, Inspector (IT/CE), Sub Inspector (CBI/NIA), Junior Statistical Officer, Assistant Audit Officer, Tax Assistant, Auditor, Accountant, Postal Assistant, and more
basic_details.total_vacancies: Approximately 12,256 (tentative; updated vacancies will be on https://ssc.gov.in)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at https://ssc.gov.in or via mY SSC mobile app
basic_details.short_information: SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 12256 vacancies for Group B & Group C vacancies across India. Candidates can apply online only from 21.05.2026 to 22.06.2026 through SSC website ssc.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid online through BHIM UPI, Net Banking, or Visa, Mastercard, Maestro, and RuPay debit cards. Fee once paid will not be refunded, and applications without required fee payment will be rejected.

age_limit.details: Age will be calculated as on 01-08-2026. The date of birth recorded in the Matriculation or Secondary Examination Certificate will be treated as final.

qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University or equivalent for most posts, as on 01-08-2026.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Secretariat Assistant / Upper Division Clerk

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Senior Secretariat Assistant / Upper Division Clerk

salary_details.salary: Pay Level 4 (Rs. 25,500–81,100) to Pay Level 8 (Rs. 47,600–1,51,100) depending on the post

exam_pattern.subject: A. General Intelligence & Reasoning
exam_pattern.duration: 1 hour (Sectional timer: 15 min per section) 1 hour 20 min for scribe-eligible PwBD candidates

exam_pattern.subject: Section-I: Mathematical Abilities + Reasoning & General Intelligence
exam_pattern.duration: Session-I: 2 hrs 15 min; Section-I: 1 hr timer

how_to_apply: Generate One-Time Registration (OTR) at https://ssc.gov.in (mandatory; use Aadhaar-based authentication if possible)
Complete OTR profile and lock it
Fill the Common Application Form (CAF) including live photograph capture via camera
Upload scanned signature (JPEG/JPG, 10–20 KB, 6.0 cm × 2.0 cm)
Fill the Examination Specific Module (post preferences, exam centre choices - 3 centres within same region in order of priority)
Pay application fee of Rs. 100/- online (if applicable) by 23-06-2026
Preview/Print the application to verify all details before final submission
Use the correction window (29-06 to 01-07-2026) if any correction is needed (chargeable)
Keep printout of application and all documents for at least 3 years
important_instructions: Final allotment is based on merit-cum-preference, and no alternate post will be offered if a candidate fails post-specific standards after allotment.
OBC candidates claiming reservation must not belong to the creamy layer as on the closing date of application.
EWS certificate must be valid for FY 2026–27 and should be based on income for FY 2025–26.
PwBD candidates must choose the correct sub-category in the application form because no later change is allowed.
Scribe rules are strict: the scribe must complete OTR, be Aadhaar-authenticated, and cannot assist more than one candidate.
Compensatory time of 20 minutes per hour is available to eligible PwBD candidates.
Tentative answer keys can be challenged online by paying Rs. 100 per question within the specified period only.
No re-evaluation or re-checking of scores is available at any stage.
Candidates should preserve the application form and related documents for at least 3 years.
Candidature remains provisional until certificates and documents are verified by the Appointing Authority.
Fraudulent claims of reservation status may lead to debarment from all SSC examinations.
Any update in exam schedule or process will be communicated through the SSC website only.
Applications without the required fee, unless exempted, or incomplete applications will be summarily rejected.

click_here.text: Download SSC CGL 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SSC CGL 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for SSC CGL 2026 is 22 June 2026 (23:00 hours). The fee payment can be made until 23 June 2026 (23:00 hours).

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in SSC CGL 2026?
faq.answer: Approximately 12,256 vacancies are available for Group B and Group C posts across various Ministries and Departments of the Government of India. The exact vacancy details will be updated on the official SSC website.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for SSC CGL 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university or equivalent as on 01-08-2026. For Junior Statistical Officer (JSO), candidates need either 60% marks in Mathematics at 12th level or a degree with Statistics as a subject. Final year appearing candidates can also apply but must possess the degree by the cut-off date.

faq.question: What is the age limit for SSC CGL 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post: 18-27 years for Group C posts, 18-30 years or 20-30 years for most Group B posts, and 18-32 years for Junior Statistical Officer. Age will be calculated as on 01-08-2026, with relaxations available for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), PwBD (10-15 years), and Ex-Servicemen as per rules.

faq.question: What is the application fee for SSC CGL 2026?
faq.answer: General, OBC, and EWS male candidates must pay Rs. 100/- as a non-refundable application fee. Women candidates (all categories), SC/ST, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen eligible for reservation are exempted from the fee. Fee payment can be made through BHIM UPI, Net Banking, or debit cards.

faq.question: What is the selection process for SSC CGL 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a two-tier Computer Based Examination. Tier-I has 100 questions (200 marks) covering General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, and English Comprehension. Tier-II includes Paper-I (mandatory for all), Paper-II (for JSO/Statistical Investigator), and Paper-III (for AAO). Both tiers have negative marking.

faq.question: When will the SSC CGL 2026 Tier-I exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The Tier-I Computer Based Examination is tentatively scheduled for August-September 2026, while Tier-II is expected in December 2026. Exact dates will be announced on the official SSC website closer to the exam.

faq.question: Can I apply for SSC CGL 2026 if I am in the final year of graduation?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates appearing in the final year of their Bachelor's Degree can apply, but they must possess the essential educational qualification on or before 01-08-2026. If the university declares results after this date, the candidature will be invalid even if exams were completed earlier.

faq.question: Is there any correction window for SSC CGL 2026 application?
faq.answer: Yes, the correction window will be open from 29-06-2026 to 01-07-2026 (23:00 hours). The first correction costs Rs. 200/- and the second correction costs Rs. 500/-. This fee applies to all candidates, including those who were exempted from the initial application fee.

faq.question: What is the pay scale for SSC CGL 2026 posts?
faq.answer: Pay scales range from Pay Level 4 (Rs. 25,500-81,100) for Group C posts like Postal Assistant and Tax Assistant to Pay Level 8 (Rs. 47,600-1,51,100) for Group B Gazetted posts like Assistant Audit Officer. Pay Level 7 posts include Assistant Section Officer and Inspector positions (Rs. 44,900-1,42,400).
